content.problemStatement:
Now we are going to build our application from scratch

First of all we need to establish our backend server for which we are going to use express, mongoose, and dotenv. And we will setup our database for the users too here.

### Task:
1. Write your own mongo connection string in .env file. 
2. Write the user database schema to include all these: 

| Field     | Type   | Required | Unique | Default   | Enum                  | Description       |
|-----------|--------|----------|--------|-----------|------------------------|-------------------|
| name      | String | No       | No     | None      | N/A                    | User's name       |
| email     | String | Yes      | Yes    | None      | N/A                    | User's email      |
| password  | String | Yes      | No     | None      | N/A                    | User's password   |
| role      | String | No       | No     | "customer"| "customer", "admin"   | User's role       |
| balance   | Number | No       | No     | 10000     | N/A                    | User's balance    |

3. Complete the `server.js` all the instructions are given in comments.
